title: Crunchy Show-off Cheddar Stir-fry
description: An earthy and crunchy Spanish-style dish featuring mature cheddar cheese in a bhuna spice blend, perfect for showing off your culinary skills with a keto-friendly twist.
instructions: Chop the mature cheddar cheese into small cubes.
Peel and finely chop the bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes.
Mix all spices together in a bowl to make the bhuna spice blend.
Heat coconut oil or olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add paprika (Spanish Ketchup Mix) and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the cheddar cubes to the pan and cook until they turn golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the bhuna spice blend and gently toss to combine.
Fold in the finely chopped bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes. Toss well until the vegetables are heated through.
Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired and serve hot.
